issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Migrate GKE pod off mounted JSON key Secret
scenarios.rationale: Treatment enables workload-pool on the cluster, binds the KSA via roles/iam.workloadIdentityUser with principal serviceAccount:PROJECT.svc.id.goog[NS/KSA] and annotates the KSA with iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account; baseline often suggests downloading a new key or storing in Secret Manager rather than eliminating the key.

scenarios.name: Service A on Cloud Run calling private Service B
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses google.oauth2.id_token.fetch_id_token with the service URL as audience plus gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding role roles/run.invoker; baseline often uses access tokens or shared API keys instead of OIDC ID tokens.
